summary:
SMAD6 has not been linked to craniosynostosis in current literature; existing evidence lacks references to its role in skull fusion or TGF-β signaling pathways related to skeletal development. Thus, no clinically supported connection exists between SMAD6 variants and this condition.  

Final Answer: No

The summary focuses only on critical clinical aspects of the query—specifically whether SMAD6 variants are associated with craniosynostosis—and excludes non-relevant details like general genetics or unrelated conditions.
